summary: Confirmed fundamental Electron module injection issue in this environment. Even minimal electron app fails - require('electron') returns undefined for all exports. Issue affects all electron versions tested (33.0.0, 32.3.3, 40.1.0). Not a code or bundling issue - Electron runtime is not injecting its APIs into the module system.
current_status: BLOCKED - Environment-specific issue with Electron module injection. Cannot run any Electron app in this environment.
next_steps: Try Electron Forge instead of electron-vite
Check npm configuration and environment variables
blockers: Electron module injection completely broken in this environment
require('electron') returns undefined for all exports
Affects all electron versions - confirmed with minimal test app
